MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Chernev (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Robert Gordon.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUSAN PASCUAL and ZUSSETTE NACNAC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support each cause of action pled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SUSAN PASCUAL and ZUSSETTE NACNAC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to February 4, 2020 on Court's own motion. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
